title: podocarpus × loderi
intro: Podocarpus × loderi, also known as the Loder's Cypress or Fern Pine, is a hybrid plant species within the family Podocarpaceae, resulting from the cross between Podocarpus macrophyllus and P. gracilior. This plant has been utilized in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Podocarpus × loderi include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy.
